demo.title: Commission a song
demo.code:
commission a song from EBM about a storm at sea

-> approves 100,000 EBM to the CommissionBooth, then calls
   commission(bandId, idea, handle). The band writes your song
   and posts it on X, tagging you.

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured
Hold 100,000 of the band's token on Base (buy via the mft-buy-band skill if needed)
Enable arbitrary contract calls (Bankr Security -> keep 'Disable arbitrary contract calls' OFF)
Commission: say `commission a song from EBM about <your idea>`
